name: Evidence Board Briefing
scene: a giant evidence board with pinned photos, suspect notes, and case documents, four characters actively briefing each other, one pins a clue onto the board, one turns to argue a theory, one crosses arms and responds, one holds files and leans forward, dramatic side light, strong depth, investigation room atmosphere
titleStyle: design the title as a dramatic ivory and crimson mystery plaque with metallic inlay, ornamental borders, subtle embossed texture, and elegant Japanese poster typography
